services.name: pub.report:runFileTemplate
services.description: WmPublic. Applies a template file to a document (IData object).

input_parameters.name: $values
input_parameters.description: Document Document (IData object) to bind against $template.

input_parameters.name: fileEncoding
input_parameters.description: String Optional. The encoding of the template file. If fileEncoding is not specified, the default file encoding specified in the watt.server.netEncoding server parameter or the system file encoding will be used. Examples: SJIS, ASCII, ISO8859_1.

usage_notes: If a template is not available in a templates directory of any of the packages on the server, you can use this service by passing in a File object representing the template.
Integration Server executes any services in the template file using the credentials of the user who invoked the pub.report:runFileTemplate service.

services.name: pub.report:runFileTemplateOnPipe
services.description: WmPublic. Applies a template to the pipeline.

input_parameters.name: fileEncoding
input_parameters.description: String Optional. The encoding of the template file. If fileEncoding is not specified, the default file encoding specified in the watt.server.netEncoding server parameter or the system file encoding will be used. Examples: SJIS, ASCII, ISO8859_1.

output_parameters.name: $txt
output_parameters.description: String Results from applying $template to the pipeline.

usage_notes: If a template is not available in a templates directory of any of the packages on the server, you can use this service to pass a File object representing the template file.
Integration Server executes any services in the template file using the credentials of the user who invoked the pub.report:runFileTemplateOnPipe service.

services.name: pub.report:runStringTemplate
services.description: WmPublic. Applies an output template to a specified document (IData object).

input_parameters.name: $values
input_parameters.description: Document Document (IData object) to bind against $template.

usage_notes: This service is typically invoked from other services that already have a template in a String object and an IData object that will be used to bind against the template.
Integration Server executes any services in the template file using the credentials of the user who invoked the pub.report:runStringTemplate service.

services.name: pub.report:runStringTemplateOnPipe
services.description: WmPublic. Applies a template to the pipeline.

input_parameters.name: $template
input_parameters.description: String Template to apply to pipeline.

output_parameters.name: $txt
output_parameters.description: String Result from applying $template to the pipeline.

usage_notes: This service is typically invoked from other services that already have a template in a String object and need the template to bind against the pipeline.
Integration Server executes any services in the template file using the credentials of the user who invoked the pub.report:runStringTemplateOnPipe service.

services.name: pub.report:runTemplate
services.description: WmPublic. Applies a template in a file to a specified document (IData object).

input_parameters.name: $template
input_parameters.description: String Name of the template file (for example, mytemp.html or mytemp.xml).

input_parameters.name: $package
input_parameters.description: String Name of the package where the template resides (for example, Default).

input_parameters.name: $values
input_parameters.description: Document Document (IData object) to bind against $template.

input_parameters.name: fileEncoding
input_parameters.description: String Optional. The encoding of the template file. If fileEncoding is not specified, the default file encoding specified in the watt.server.netEncoding server parameter or the system file encoding will be used. Examples: SJIS, ASCII, ISO8859_1.

output_parameters.name: $txt
output_parameters.description: String Result from applying the template to $values.

usage_notes: The pub.report:runTemplate service uses template files that reside in the pub and templates directories of the package. The service locates the output template by its file name and the name of the package in which it resides. For example, to apply a template that resides in IntegrationServer_directory\packages\Default\templates\mytemp.xml, invoke the service with the following values.
Integration Server executes any services in the template file using the credentials of the user who invoked the pub.report:runTemplate service.

services.name: pub.report:runTemplateOnPipe
services.description: WmPublic. Applies a template in a file to the pipeline.

input_parameters.name: $template
input_parameters.description: String Name of template file (for example, mytemp.html ormytemp.xml).

input_parameters.name: $package
input_parameters.description: String Name of the package in which the template resides (for example, Default).

input_parameters.name: fileEncoding
input_parameters.description: String Optional. The encoding of the template file. If fileEncoding is not specified, the default file encoding specified in the watt.server.netEncoding server parameter or the system file encoding will be used. Examples: SJIS, ASCII, ISO8859_1.

output_parameters.name: $txt
output_parameters.description: String Results from applying the template file to the pipeline.

usage_notes: The pub.report:runTemplateOnPipe service uses template files that reside in the pub and templates directories of the package. The service locates the output template by its file name and the name of the package in which it resides. For example, to apply a template that resides in IntegrationServer_directory\packages\Default\templates\mytemp.xml, invoke the service with the following values.
Integration Server executes any services in the template file using the credentials of the user who invoked the pub.report:runTemplateOnPipe service.
